name: z-sdk-games-library
description: Z_SDK-games-library — juegos Zeus (delta, pozo, solve-coagula), start packs y CARPETA DRAMATURGO

scripts.test: npm run test:delta && npm run test:pozo && npm run test:solve-coagula && npm run test:startpack && npm run test:carpeta-dramaturgo
scripts.test:delta: npm test -w @zeus/arg-domain && npm test -w @zeus/arg-feeds && npm test -w @zeus/arg-console && npm test -w @zeus/arg-player-mcp
scripts.test:startpack: npm test -w @zeus/startpack-kit && npm test -w @zeus/startpack-delta && npm test -w @zeus/startpack-pozo && npm test -w @zeus/startpack-sketch && npm test -w @zeus/startpack-solve-coagula && npm test -w @zeus/startpack-plaza && npm test -w @zeus/startpack-ciudad
